title: VerificationGateRecord
description: A clinician's attested decision on one generated output — the mandatory human-in-the-loop checkpoint (Clinician Verification Portal, ARCH_PLAN C9/§3.5.5). No patient path opens without a valid record whose decision releases the EXACT candidate_output_hash (or, for 'amended', the exact amended_output_hash). The hash binding is the medicolegal link between what was generated, what the clinician saw, and what the patient receives.

run_id.description: The verification run that produced the output under review.

candidate_output_hash.description: SHA-256 of the exact generated output the clinician reviewed (the medicolegal anchor from the VerificationReport).

clinician_id.description: Professional identifier of the reviewing clinician (e.g. AHPRA registration reference). Not patient data.

decision.description: approved: the generated output may be released verbatim. rejected: nothing is released. amended: only the clinician's amended text (amended_output_hash) may be released.

decided_at_utc.description: When the clinician attested the decision (UTC ISO-8601).

signature_ref.description: Reference to the clinician's attestation artefact (signature record / audit token). Never the credential itself.

amended_output_hash.description: REQUIRED when decision='amended': SHA-256 of the exact amended text. The amendment is a new medicolegal artifact with its own hash; the original candidate_output_hash remains the record of what was generated.

notes.description: Optional clinician notes on the decision.
